text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
First visit! ♪ First visit! ♪ The first shrine visit of
the new year! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna drink some amazake and eat some fried
squid! Oh, and I gotta gulp down some cold
water!
choice_data_list: Cold water?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you don't know? Shrines always have those
little fountains!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And they got cups and everything! But it's hard to
hold them 'cause they've got these weird, long
handles.
choice_data_list: ...You're not supposed to drink from those.
...You're not supposed to drink from those.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wait, really?! But the water is so nice and cold!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Let's go write down our wishes!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I've got a ton of wishes. First is "I wanna enter the
Arima Kinen!"

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And also "I wanna eat tasty carrots!" and "I wanna
get first place a lot!"

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
"I wanna become really fast!" and "I wanna
become really strong!" and "I wanna have a lot of
fun!" and...
choice_data_list: How about you choose just one to write down?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Just one? Mmm... It's too hard to pick!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What would you write if you were me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right now, Haru Urara is set on entering the
Arima Kinen. Which means it'd be good for her to
wish for...
choice_data_list: Health! Wish to run races in good condition!
Overall improvement! Wish to level up!

Strong technique! Wish to be skilled enough for
the big leagues!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh! Health does come first! I can't race if I'm not feeling well!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But I'm always plenty healthy and full of energy
already! So you want me to feel even better?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two! One... Actually...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ura, Ura, Ura, Ura! Uraaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow, saying "Ura, Ura" while I run is so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not the way I imagined it, but Haru Urara
becomes even more energetic than before.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Level up! That sounds so cool!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Actually, I know how to level up! I saw it on TV!
choice_data_list: Can you show me?
Can you show me?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Of course! Watch this!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: DA, DA, DA, DUUUN! Haru Urara leveled up!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I feel stronger already! Mhm, I'm just gonna
keep leveling up like this!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: DA, DA, DA, DUUUN! DA, DA, DA, DUUUN!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! I've gotten so much stronger! I think!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, maybe a modest amount self-delusion has
its uses. I'll just leave her to it.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ooh, the big leagues!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Uh, what are those?
choice_data_list: It means you'll be on track to becoming a pro.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hmm? On track? Which track? What kind of pro?
choice_data_list: In your case, it's a racing track.
In your case, it's a racing track.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: OH! A racing track!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I get it! I'm gonna be a racing track pro!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara seems ready to go. I'm sure she's off
to hone her unique skills.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I've finished writing my wish!
choice_data_list: Then let's head back to do some training.
Then let's head back to do some training.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What?! Training, already?!
choice_data_list: You don't want to?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I love running, but... look at all these stalls!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Can't we stay for a little longer?
choice_data_list: I thought you wanted to run in the Arima Kinen.
I thought you wanted to run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I do, but I... Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You mean I have to start training now if I wanna compete?
choice_data_list:
You have no chance of winning if you don't take
your training seriously.

You have no chance of winning if you don't take
your training seriously.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I am taking it seriously! I'm always running my hardest, y'know!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I always go full force till I hear the whistle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but worry. It sounds like Haru Urara
thinks the Arima Kinen is just a normal race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So far she's just been racing for fun, but now
results are actually going to be important if she
wants to qualify for the graded races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We need to work on her form and times as well as
prep her on how to run in graded races.
choice_data_list:
Urara, do you want to try running in the Negishi
Stakes?

Urara, do you want to try running in the Negishi
Stakes?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Sure!
choice_data_list: You didn't even think about it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Why would I? I love running! Hey, can we do
another lap around the shrine?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess her listening to what I have to say is a
measure of progress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In any case, our next goal is the Negishi Stakes!
